releaseNotes: New: a 'Recently Watched' folder in Live TV (long-press it to clear, or long-press a channel to remove it). Multi-Screen now opens the channel picker right on the channel that pane is already playing. Pressing Left from the posters/channels goes back to the folder you were on. Double-press OK to play/pause no longer pops the controls out. Live channels now auto-reconnect if they drop (manual Resync still works). Update from Settings -> Check for Updates.
